mapper.select: SELECT user_id, username, nickname, email, phone, avatar, signature, gender, birthday, status, is_deleted, like_total_count, follow_count, fans_count, last_login_time, create_time, update_time FROM sys_user WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET like_total_count = like_total_count + #{delta} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE sys_user SET follow_count = follow_count + #{delta} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE sys_user SET fans_count = fans_count + #{delta} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE sys_user SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
